title: What is the difference between @Autowired and @Qualifier annotations?

answers.junior: @Autowired injects a bean by type. @Qualifier helps choose which bean to inject when there are multiple beans of the same type.
answers.middle: @Autowired is for automatic injection. @Qualifier specifies the exact bean to inject by name. Use @Qualifier with @Autowired when multiple beans exist.
answers.senior: @Autowired resolves dependencies by type. @Qualifier resolves ambiguity by specifying the bean name. Constructor injection with @Qualifier is best for clarity. Unique bean names are important for maintainability.
answers.tricky: @Qualifier prevents runtime errors from ambiguous dependencies. Use meaningful bean names. Constructor injection with @Qualifier improves testability and reliability. Avoid field injection for maintainability.
